title: Email Notification Not Triggered for Certain Update Workflow Transitions in Product Workflow (PIM)
description: *Description:* In the PIM Product Workflow, email notifications are not triggered for specific transitions performed by *Product Head* and *Marketing Head*. title: Incorrect Action Buttons Displayed in SKU Update Workflow
description: *Description:* The action button dropdown menus are not displaying the correct options for each user role, deviating from the prescribed workflow: * *Product Developer* should see only the *"Approve"* button, but currently sees *"SKU Enrichment Done"*. * *Product Manager* should see *"SKU Enrichment Done"* in the action dropdown (_after initial approval and enrichment step_), but currently sees *"Approve"*. * *"Update"* button must be removed from the Product Manager's action button in all scenarios except when specifically required by role/workflow. * *Product Head* should see only an *"Update to Product Manager"* button (rename from "Update"), but currently this is inconsistent. * *Product Manager*, in the update flow after Product Head requests an update, should see an action button labeled *"SKU Enrichment Done After Update"* (this label is missing/distinct from initial enrichment), but instead sees the default. *Impact:* Improper action buttons are available to users, which can lead to incorrect processing, workflow confusion, and improper status transitions. *Steps to Reproduce:* # Login as Product Developer and edit SKU details. # Observe dropdown actions (should only have "Approve"). # Login as Product Manager and advance to SKU through workflow; check buttons at each stage ("SKU Enrichment Done" should appear). # Advance to Product Head; observe available actions ("Update to Product Manager" only, not generic "Update"). # After Product Head triggers an update, check Product Manager's action dropdown ("SKU Enrichment Done After Update" should appear). # At all stages, verify that only context-appropriate buttons are present. *Expected:* Dropdown options are strictly limited by role and workflow state, matching process diagram. !Changes in Existing Product Workflow.drawio.png|width=780,height=781,alt="Changes in Existing Product Workflow.drawio.png"! title: Restrict Future Date Selection in ERP Form Date Filters
description: This functionality will be developed in Phase 2. h3. *Description:* *Issue:* In the ERP form, users are currently able to select *future dates* in the *Start Date* and *End Date* fields. This leads to incorrect behavior in the PIM ID listing, as no PIM IDs are created with future dates. As a result, the filter returns no records. *Expected Behavior:* * Users should *not be allowed* to select any *future date* in either the *Start Date* or *End Date* fields. * The date picker should be restricted to allow selection *only up to the current date (today)*. *Impact:* * Prevents confusion and improves the accuracy of the filter results. * Ensures valid data retrieval based on actual PIM ID creation dates. *Scope:* * Applicable to the ERP form's Start Date and End Date fields used for filtering PIM IDs. !Screenshot 2025-07-10 at 7.54.55 PM.png|width=1088,height=549,alt="Screenshot 2025-07-10 at 7.54.55 PM.png"!

title: SAG multiselect values fail to save after Pimcore runtime update
description: After the latest Pimcore runtime update, SAG multiselect values intermittently disappear when a Product Manager saves NPI data. The same payload works after downgrading the affected Pimcore select component package.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Login as Product Manager.
2. Create a New NPI under Coated Industrial.
3. Select multiple SAG values.
4. Save and reopen the product.
rca: Pimcore select/multiselect component regression in the installed 11.x patch caused selected option serialization to drop values.
root_cause_corrective_actions: Pinned the Pimcore admin UI package to the stable patch version and verified SAG selections after save.
recent_comments: Dev: Issue reproduced only after Pimcore admin package update.
Dev: Pinned package version and cleared Pimcore cache.
QA: SAG multiselect now persists for Coated and Bonded PMGs.
notes_for_eval: rca says Pimcore component regression fixed by dependency pin

title: DAM thumbnail preview broken due to image processing library mismatch
description: DAM images upload successfully but thumbnails are not generated for Product Manager and DAM Manager users. Original assets are present in Pimcore assets, but the preview transformation fails.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Login as DAM Manager.
2. Upload JPG asset for a product.
3. Open DAM tab as Product Manager.
4. Check thumbnail preview.
rca: Image thumbnail generation failed after the server picked an incompatible image processing library version.
root_cause_corrective_actions: Pinned the image processing dependency and regenerated DAM thumbnails for affected assets.
recent_comments: Dev: Asset upload is fine, thumbnail worker fails during transform.
DevOps: Dependency version pinned on UAT and production.
QA: Thumbnail preview visible after cache clear.
notes_for_eval: rca says incompatible image dependency was pinned
